steps.title: Review the refreshed parameter recovery workspace
instructions: Confirm the latest unresolved count from /tmp/product-parameter-source-recovery-summary-latest.json.
Review the generated batch manifest and family mapping checklist before any write-side recovery step.

steps.title: Plan category and schema normalization decisions
instructions: Assign missing categories only when a defensible family/category match exists.
Choose final parameter ids for the unresolved families before generating any curated override file.
Treat FIGANI, FOASW, and SPEFA as source/manual recovery until a real category/schema mapping is approved.
